basic_info.headline: Applied AI @ Anthropic
basic_info.about:
Lover of technology + how people use it. Know my way around crafting up a creative solution to delight those who need it most. Firm believer in elevating people in what they're passionate about.

Let's connect if you want to talk Solutions!

experience.title: Founding Sales Engineer
experience.description: Vareto is the only connected, collaborative planning and analytics platform built for enterprise teams. We make it easy for companies to evaluate their business performance, plan for the future, and make operational decisions. We're proudly backed by industry-leading investors, executives, and finance teams.

experience.title: Solutions Engineering Manager
experience.description:
• Increased SE team deal involvement with all AEs by 187% in my first two quarters leading the team vs. the previous two quarters.
• Drove a team win rate of 57%, bringing in over 450+ opportunities in my first two quarters leading the team. The win rate without an SE on the deal over this period of time was 33%, a difference of 24%.
• Created and formalized an entirely new request flow for AEs -> SEs using Slack that has since gotten 2.8k+ uses.
• Sat on or was a decision-maker on the interview process for every single team member currently reporting to me in the pre-sales org.
• Still juggled multiple AEs I was directly mapped to while I managed the SE team, keeping up a win rate of 65%.

experience.title: Senior Solutions Engineer
experience.description:
• Drove a 63.67% win rate and was attributed to millions in ARR on 121 deals in just 6 months at Envoy.  
• Partnered with and mentored 20+ AEs at Envoy, focused on deep dives into technical features/best practices.  
• Led onboarding efforts/mentorship for the SE team in API, SQL, technical skills, and future career path.  
• Sat on the interview panel for key candidates in the Success org and led review efforts for technical competency.  
• Revamped Loopio/Gong and implemented integral cross-functional workflows for the SE Request process.

experience.title: Implementation Architect
experience.description:
As an Implementation Architect, my biggest responsibility was making sure our large-scale Enterprise customers successfully deployed Dropbox in their technical environments. My tasks on the job included working hand-in-hand with Solutions Architects to scope out the technical aspects of the prospect, walking through a full cycle of Dropbox Business implementation for Enterprise, Mid-Market, and SMB customers (talking directly with CTOs/CISOs/CIOs/Director of IT), creating product and implementation assets that were distributable in nature to automate processes, leading internal onboarding workshops to educate on product implementation and product usage, close mentorship of other team members joining the immediate Implementation team, collecting, understanding, and iterating over customer feedback by working closely with and connecting the Product and Engineering team to the Architect organization with regular cadences and a strategic communication pipeline, and creating/running a new implementation program for our smaller customer segment.

I also sat on several interview panels for new Dropbox hires and mentored employees requesting feedback on ongoing customer engagements and technical subjects.

education.degree: Bachelor’s Degree, Electrical and Electronics Engineering
education.activities: DCF, Intramural Soccer, Intramural Volleyball, Open Mic/ Music Performances

projects.name: Voice Activated Arduino Alarm Clock
projects.description: I soldered, wired, and programmed an Arduino UNO microcontroller, an electret microphone, an RTC component, and a pushbutton and combined them all to create a novel twist on the tradition alarm clock. The alarm clock will prompt you at a set time and the prompt will tell you to shout to deactivate the alarm. If you shout at a certain decibel level, the alarm will deactivate and the prompt will then confirm that you have successfully deactivated the alarm. If you don't shout loudly enough, you will be met by a blaring alarm which is then turned off by a manual control button located next to the device.

projects.name: Autonomous Vehicle Design
projects.description: Senior design project that used the KL25Z development platform with a custom PCB that we designed to create an autonomous vehicle that could stay within two lines or track one line. We used a combination of histogram and PWM functions and won 1st place at the National NXP Cup in Austin.
